CustomField.description: Developer name of the entitlement source. Interpretation depends on Entitlement_Type__c: for PermissionSet use PermissionSet.Name; for PermissionSetGroup use PermissionSetGroup.DeveloperName; for Profile use Profile.Name. EntitlementService resolves the name against the matching object; missing names are dropped silently. Used to compute the entitled-user denominator for adoption metrics.
CustomField.label: Source Developer Name
